name: Eggless Blueberry Muffins
tagline: Tall-domed blueberry muffins with sugar-crusted tops, no eggs

hero.alt: Tall-domed blueberry muffins with sugar tops in tin
hero.caption: eggless blueberry muffins — tall dome

steps.title: Toss berries in flour
steps.detail: Toss blueberries with 2 tbsp flour. Set aside.
steps.tip: If using frozen, don't thaw — they bleed less straight from the bag.

steps.title: Cream butter and sugar
steps.detail: Whisk melted butter and sugar. Add yogurt, apple sauce, milk; whisk until smooth.
steps.tip: Apple sauce keeps the crumb moist for days.

steps.title: Fold in dry, then berries
steps.detail: Whisk remaining flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt. Fold into wet just until combined. Fold in floured blueberries.
steps.tip: Fold gently to keep berries intact and avoid streaks.

steps.title: Bake hot then medium
steps.detail: Fill muffin cups to the top, sprinkle coarse sugar. Start at 425°F for 5 minutes, drop to 350°F for 18 minutes — that initial heat builds the dome.
steps.tip: Two-stage temperature is the bakery secret to bakery-tall muffins.

healthFacts: No eggs — yogurt and apple sauce do the binding.
Blueberries are among the highest-antioxidant fruits per calorie.
Tossing berries in flour stops them from sinking to the bottom of the batter.
